task_description: find all Python files, identify imported third-party modules, generate a frequency table, save it to JSON, and print the ten most common modules
code:
echo "Extracting import statements from Python files"
grep -oP 'import \K[a-zA-Z0-9._]+' $(cat python_files.txt) > imports.txt
grep -oP 'from \K[a-zA-Z0-9._]+' $(cat python_files.txt) >> imports.txt
echo "Imports extracted to imports.txt"
cat imports.txt

task description:

task description: find all Python files, identify imported third-party modules, generate a frequency table, save it to JSON, and print the ten most common modules

```bash
echo "Starting task: Finding all Python files"
find . -name "*.py" > python_files.txt
echo "Python files listed in python_files.txt"
cat python_files.txt
```
